subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ2.4
question_html:
What is the concentration, in mol dm−3, of 20.0 g of NaOH (Mr = 40.0) in 500.0 cm3?

A. 0.250

B. 0.500

C. 1.00

D. 4.00
examiners_html: 75 % of the candidates were able to calculate the molar concentration of the NaOH solution. The question had a good discrimination index.
